Node started: Given a finite set of binary strings S, construct a new set of binary strings S' such that for every string s in S, there exists a string s' in S' where s is a prefix of s'. The set S' must satisfy the prefix-free property, meaning no string in S' is a prefix of any other string in S'. The optimization objective is to minimize the sum of the lengths of all strings in S'.
